name: mistral-resume-analyser-monorepo
description: AI Resume Analyzer web and desktop application
author: NxtWave

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace server && npm run typecheck --workspace client
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run desktop:prepare-env && npm run build && node desktop/run-electron.cjs
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:prepare-env && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.desktop:portable: npm run desktop:prepare-env && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable
